summary: Plan-only live PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. All five open PRs are distinct work items and should remain open for normal review/proof handling; no close, merge, fix, or raise-PR action is planned.

actions.reason: Distinct feature/API PR with supplied proof; keep open for normal review rather than close or merge in this plan-only inventory job.
Distinct Slack behavior PR that still needs proof; keep open as independent inventory rather than close or merge.
Small focused restart/lsof PR linked to an unhydrated issue; keep open independently for proof/review rather than close or mark fixed-by-candidate.
Distinct cron warning PR with unhydrated linked refs and failing proof; keep open independently for review/proof.
Low-signal/docs concerns are present, but closeout is disabled for this job and no boringly superseded duplicate is hydrated; keep open independently.
